name: afo-harness-registry-mcp
description: Live, always-in-sync registry for AFO agent boot commands. GitHub-backed, read-only.

tools.name: harness_status
tools.description: Returns registry health, total command count, and agent list.

tools.name: list_boot_commands
tools.description: Returns all available boot commands as structured objects. Filterable by agent.

agent.description: Filter by agent. Omit or pass 'all' for the full list.

tools.name: get_boot_command
tools.description: Returns full structured object for a named boot command, including complete markdown content.

tools.name: search_boot_commands
tools.description: Keyword search across command names and descriptions.

bindings.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
bindings.purpose: GitHub Contents API reads from nothinginfinity/versioned-agent-harness
